common.get-login-bonus: You have received a login bonus!
common.failed-to-get-list-of-artist: Failed to get list of the member
common.name: Name
common.image-size-alert: Image size shoul be smaller than 10MB
signin.email-verification-sent: Email verification sent. Please check your email.
signin.email-too-many-requests: Too many emails sent in a short period of time. Please wait a while and try again.
signin.password-reset-email-sent: Password reset email sent. Please check your email.
signin.password-reset-email-failed: Failed to send password reset email
signin.email-verification: Once the verification is complete, you will be automatically redirected to the next screen.
signin.email-verification-description: You will be able to use the service after setting your name and attributes on the next screen.
signin.name: Name (Not disclosed to users other than the office)
signin.attribute-description: If you are a curator of FRIENDSHIP. please select a curator. If you do not have any particular reason in mind, please select Other. You can change this setting later.
signin.invited-link: You have accessed from an invitation link. Please proceed with the registration.
signin.agree-to-terms: By clicking the Create Account button, you agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
purchase-dialog.title: You can purchase points.
purchase-dialog.description: Please select the number of points you want to purchase and proceed to payment.
purchase-dialog.select-amount: Select the amount of points to purchase
purchase-dialog.notion: Payments within FRIENDSHIP.DAO can be made safely with Stripe.
home.no-permission-to-view-artist: No permission to view this artist
home.plz-ask-permission-to-view: Please ask for permission to view the artist.
home.alert-for-user: If you have already done so, please wait a while before accessing. Once your viewing request is approved, you will be able to view the data.
home.alert-for-permissions: You can check the artists you are currently requesting access to in the lower left corner of the access management. (If it is not displayed, please try logging out and trying again.)
home.request-permission-dialog-title: Request permission to view artist data
home.request-permission-dialog-descripti: Please search by the official name. The search results can be scrolled. If you don't hit it well, try changing the upper and lower case letters, entering only the initials and scrolling to find it. If you still can't find it, please contact the office.
home.enter-artist-name-to-search: Enter the artist's name and search
concierge.welcome: Hello! I'm the concierge. If you have any questions, feel free to ask!
concierge.notion: This feature is experimental and may not be accurate in its answers or content. Please be aware of this. Accuracy will improve in future updates.
concierge.hint: hint: Be specific about the artist's name or group name.
concierge.ask-me-anything: Ask me anything with My Concierge.
message.select-user-to-send: Please select a user to send.
message.file-size-alert: Please keep the file size under 10MB
message.enter-message-with-navigation: Enter your message here. (Press Shift + Enter to enter)
offer.offer-creation-notion: Users who hold 20 FSP or more can create an Offer
offer.offer-info: OFFERS allows artists to find and recruit for tasks that can support them in their musical activities.
offer.find-offer-guide: You can find recruiting Offers by clicking the magnifying glass icon in the upper right corner of the screen.
offer.offer-subject: Target Audience (Musician, Curator, Creator, Supporter etc.)
offer.attached-media: Attached Media (PDF files or MP4 videos)
offer.apply.confirmation: Are you sure you want to apply?
offer.delete-confirmation-description: Are you sure you want to delete this offer?
offer.create.description: Enter the details of the offer and create it.
offer.create.attach-media-description: You can upload PDF files and video files (MP4).
offer.create.file-upload-description: When you upload an offer image, it will be used as the main image and thumbnail of the offer page.
offer.create.file-upload-description-1: Media such as songs, PDFs, and images related to the offer will be displayed on the offer page when uploaded.
offer.create.title-placeholder: Example: Looking for people related to the event!
offer.create.deadline-placeholder: Example: Until the end of April 2024
offer.create.skills-placeholder: Example: Artists with digital skills, promoters who have promoted festivals
offer.create.publicity-description: If you make it private, only the specified users can view it.
